name: Fish Lamp
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>灯魚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フィッシュランプ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
If this card is sent to the GY as Synchro Material: You can Special Summon 2 "Lamp Tokens" (Fish/FIRE/Level 2/ATK 0/DEF 0), also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Fish monsters. If you control a Fish Synchro Monster: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 card on the field; destroy it. You can only use each effect of "Fish Lamp" once per turn.
mnst_eff:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
If this card is sent to the GY as Synchro Material: You can Special Summon 2 "Lamp Tokens" (Fish/FIRE/Level 2/ATK 0/DEF 0), also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Fish monsters. If you control a Fish Synchro Monster: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 card on the field; destroy it. You can only use each effect of "Fish Lamp" once per turn.
eff:

If you control a Fish Synchro Monster: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 card on the field; destroy it. You can only use each effect of "Fish Lamp" once per turn.

action: Activates if used as Synchro Material
Activates if sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
